fields.System.Title: Add User Management Functionality to Rostering API
fields.System.Description:
User Story
As a school administrator
I want to add new users to the Rostering system
So that teachers, staff, and students can access the platform with appropriate permissions

Background
The Rostering API currently manages students, schools, and demographics but lacks comprehensive user management functionality. This PBI covers creating new users with proper authentication, authorization, and role assignment capabilities.

Scope
This PBI focuses on the API layer for user creation. UI components will be handled in a separate PBI.

Functional Requirements
  • Create new users with email, name, and role
  • Assign users to specific schools
  • Support multiple user types: Admin, Teacher, Staff, Student
  • Validate email uniqueness
  • Generate secure password reset tokens
  • Send welcome/activation emails
  • Audit log all user creation events

Technical Requirements
  • RESTful API endpoint: POST /api/1/users
  • Authentication: JWT bearer token required
  • Authorization: Admin or School Admin roles only
  • Database: User, UserRole, UserSchool tables
  • Password hashing: BCrypt with salt
  • Email service integration for notifications

API Specification 
POST /api/1/users
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer {token}

Request Body:
{
  "email": "teacher@school.com",
  "firstName": "Test",
  "lastName": "Test",
  "role": "Teacher",
  "schoolId": "guid",
  "sendWelcomeEmail": true
}

Response 201 Created:
{
  "id": "new-user-guid",
  "email": "teacher@school.com",
  "firstName": "Test",
  "lastName": "Test",
  "role": "Teacher",
  "schoolId": "guid",
  "isActive": true,
  "createdAt": "2026-04-13T10:00:00Z",
  "passwordResetToken": "secure-token",
  "passwordResetExpires": "2026-04-20T10:00:00Z"
}
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
Acceptance Criteria

AC1: Create User with Valid Data
GIVEN I am authenticated as an Admin user
WHEN I POST a user creation request with valid data
THEN the user is created in the database
AND the API returns 201 Created with the user details
AND a password reset token is generated
AND an audit log entry is created

AC2: Email Uniqueness Validation
GIVEN a user with email 'existing@school.com' already exists
WHEN I POST a user creation request with the same email
THEN the API returns 400 Bad Request
AND the error message states 'Email already exists'
AND no user is created

AC3: Authorization Check
GIVEN I am authenticated as a Teacher (non-admin) user
WHEN I POST a user creation request
THEN the API returns 403 Forbidden
AND the error message states 'Insufficient permissions'

AC4: School Association Validation
GIVEN I am a School Admin for School A
WHEN I POST a user creation request for School B
THEN the API returns 403 Forbidden
AND the error message states 'Cannot create users for other schools'

AC5: Welcome Email Sent
GIVEN I POST a user creation request with sendWelcomeEmail=true
WHEN the user is successfully created
THEN a welcome email is sent to the user's email address
AND the email contains the password reset link
AND the link expires in 7 days

AC6: Input Validation
GIVEN I POST a user creation request with invalid data
WHEN any required field is missing or invalid (invalid email format, empty name, invalid role)
THEN the API returns 400 Bad Request
AND the error response contains specific validation messages for each field

AC7: Role Assignment
GIVEN I create a user with role 'Teacher'
WHEN the user is created
THEN the user is assigned to the 'Teacher' role in the UserRole table
AND the user has Teacher-level permissions

AC8: Audit Logging
GIVEN I successfully create a user
WHEN the operation completes
THEN an audit log entry is created with: userId, createdBy, timestamp, schoolId, role
AND the log is stored in the AuditLog table

AC9: Idempotency
GIVEN I POST the same user creation request twice within 5 minutes
WHEN the second request has an identical idempotency key
THEN the API returns the existing user (201 or 200)
AND no duplicate user is created

AC10: Error Handling
GIVEN the database is unavailable
WHEN I POST a user creation request
THEN the API returns 503 Service Unavailable
AND the error is logged
AND no partial data is committed
